features: Universal VESA Compatibility - Our TV bracket fits most 17"- 42" TVs with VESA from 75x75mm to 200x200mm. Maximum weight capacity of 20kg. NOT for drywall alone installation! (VESA PATTERN OPTIONS: 75 x 75, 100 x 100, 200 x 100, 200 x 200)
Compact Design - Our fixed wall bracket will have your TV very close to the wall. 25mm low profile design
Quick & Easy Installation - Follow supplied install instructions
Reliable Strength - Made of the finest strong cold rolled steel
Supplied with all Mounting Hardware - All you require is a screwdriver, drill and a helping hand when hanging
description: From the manufacturer Universal VESA Compatibility - Our TV bracket fits 17"- 42" TVs with VESA from 75x75mm to 200x200mm. Maximum weight capacity of 20kg. NOT for drywall alone installation! (VESA PATTERN OPTIONS: 75 x 75, 100 x 100, 200 x 100, 200 x 200) Compact Design - Our fixed wall bracket will have your TV very close to the wall. 25mm low profile design Quick & Easy Installation - Follow supplied install instructions Reliable Strength - Made of the finest strong cold rolled steel Supplied with all Mounting Hardware - All you require is a screwdriver, drill and a helping hand when hanging Supplied with all Mounting Hardware - All you require is a screwdriver, drill and a helping hand when hanging Make sure this bracket is designed for your TV by checking the following: Your TV should be a size between or 17" to 42" Our TV brackets are made of strong steel to give the best heavy-duty results. AV:Link | 17- 42" Fixed TV Wall bracket for LED, LCD, 3D, Plasma, Flat Screen TV - Super Strong 20Kg Weight Capacity The AV:Link Fixed TV wall bracket is a solid bracket that will fit all major TV brands. Made of strong steel, giving you best heavy-duty results. Make sure this bracket is designed for your TV by checking the following: Your TV should be sized between 17 to 42 inches and have a VESA of MAX 200 x 200. This is the horizontal distance between the holes at the back of your TV. Our brackets include a manual for you to easily follow when installing the bracket, with all the screws for fittings required. All you need is a drill, a screwdriver, and a helping hand to get the TV up on the wall. Securely mount your television onto a brick wall or the studs of a plasterboard wall. SPECIFICATION: TV fixing screws provided 4 x M4 25mm, 4 x M5 25mm, 4 x M6 25mm, 4 x M8 25mm Screen Size 17” – 42” Max hole spacing 200 x 200mm Max weight load 20kg Distance from wall 25mm Wall plate dimensions 272 x 192mm Bracket dimensions 272 x 221mm Weight 610g Suitable for Televisions sized 17 to 42 inch VESA PATTERN OPTIONS 75 x 75, 100 x 100, 200 x 100, 200 x 200
